---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Goal

What should be added or improved?

## Problem or Need

What classroom, administration, deployment, or developer problem does this solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the preferred behavior or workflow.

## Alternatives Considered

List other options that were considered, if any.

## Affected Area

- UI / UX
- Runner / execution
- Curriculum / assessment
- Documentation
- Administration
- Security / isolation
- Distributed worker system
- Other:

## Additional Context

Add examples, screenshots, or references if helpful.
